title: cardamine scutata subsp. regeliana
intro: Cardamine scutata subsp. regeliana is a subspecies of the Cardamine scutata plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is also known as a type of bittercress, and it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cardamine scutata subsp. regeliana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
